# task-effort

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Per-task thinking-mode (effort) picker in the task detail pane; the selection is applied to Claude Code on launch. Owns the tasks_ext_effort side-table: the per-task thinking mode (effort level), applied to Claude Code at launch via --effort / --settings ultracode.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `TaskDetailSlots.Section` "effort" → `TaskEffortSection`
  - Uses: `conversations/effort-provider.EffortSelect`, `infra/endpoints.fetchEndpoint`, `primitives/collapsible.Collapsible`, `primitives/collapsible.CollapsibleContent`, `primitives/css/row.SectionHeaderRow`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/live-state.useResource`, `shell/notifications.toast`, `tasks/task-detail.TaskDetailSlots`
  - Exports: Values: `useTaskEffort`
- Server:
  - Uses: `database.db`, `infra/endpoints.implement`, `infra/entity-extensions.defineExtension`, `tasks/tasks-core._tasks`
  - DB schema: `plugins/tasks/plugins/task-effort/server/internal/tables.ts`
  - Entity extension of: `tasks/tasks-core` (table `tasks_ext_effort`)
  - Exports: Values: `getTaskEffort`, `inheritTaskEffort`, `setTaskEffort`, `taskEffortsResource`, `tasksEffort`
  - Resources: `task-efforts` (push)
  - Routes: `PUT /api/task-efforts/:taskId`, `DELETE /api/task-efforts/:taskId`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `conversations`, `tasks`
- Shared:
  - Exports: Types: `TaskEffort`, `TaskEffortsPayload`; Values: `deleteTaskEffort`, `putTaskEffort`, `TaskEffortSchema`, `TaskEffortsPayloadSchema`, `taskEffortsResource`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
